scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/app-transfer typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/app-scheduling typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/sdk typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/sdk build && bun run --cwd packages/cli typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/openclaw-plugin typecheck
scripts.release:check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run test && bun run verify:release
